name: hh-playwright
description: Browser automation service for HH Automation (no business logic)

scripts.deploy:session: node --env-file=../../.env -e "const {execFileSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');const h=process.env.DEPLOY_SSH_HOST;const r=process.env.DEPLOY_SSH_REMOTE_PATH;if(!h||!r){console.error('Set DEPLOY_SSH_HOST and DEPLOY_SSH_REMOTE_PATH in root .env');process.exit(1);}const local=process.env.PLAYWRIGHT_STORAGE_STATE_PATH||'.auth/storage-state.json';if(!fs.existsSync(local)){console.error('Missing '+local+' — run npm run auth:manual first');process.exit(1);}console.log('scp',local,'->',h+':'+r);execFileSync('scp',[local,h+':'+r],{stdio:'inherit'});"
